label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those swaps. I need to keep track of each position change step by step. Let me start by listing the initial positions. Original positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the first swap is Dave and Bob trading positions. So after this swap: - Dave becomes right midfielder (since Bob was there) - Bob becomes cheerleader (since Dave was there) Others remain the same: Alice (right winger), Claire (left winger), Eve (goalkeeper) Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. But wait, after the first swap, Dave is at right midfielder. So now he swaps with Eve. - Dave becomes goalkeeper (Eve's position) - Eve becomes right midfielder (Dave's previous position after first swap) Current positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Bob is currently cheerleader, Alice is right winger. - Alice becomes cheerleader - Bob becomes right winger Current positions: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is goalkeeper, Claire is left winger. - Dave becomes left winger - Claire becomes goalkeeper Current positions: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions again. Dave is left winger, Eve is right midfielder. - Dave becomes right midfielder - Eve becomes left winger Final positions: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper -
